description.short: Analyze large PDF documents with AI
description.full: Upload PDFs and ask natural language questions about their content. The agent processes documents that exceed normal token limits by chunking and indexing them with Azure AI Search, then uses Azure OpenAI for RAG-based question answering.

commands.title: upload
commands.description: Upload a PDF document for analysis

commands.title: query
commands.description: Ask a question about uploaded documents

commands.title: status
commands.description: Check how many documents are indexed
